title: Tool up: Pinecone’s first MCP servers are here | Pinecone
excerpt: I surely hope you are not getting too tired of MCP announcements these days. I get it if you are. If the “it’s raining cats and dogs” idiom was to be invented by some geek today, it’d probably be phrased as “it’s raining MCP servers.” That said, MCP servers coming down in buckets is not just some artificially created hype — it reflects the wider adoption of the MCP protocol that aims to standardize (and as a result, redefine) the interaction between humans, agents, and LLMs. It is a significant
